product_overview: ApexChat is a web-based AI chat SaaS that lets authenticated users access fast conversational AI, choose models, and enable advanced chat modes based on subscription tier. It also includes profile settings, voucher-based subscription management, and billing history for tracking account activity.
core_goals: Sign in to access a protected AI chat experience
Select an available AI model and send chat messages
Use advanced chat modes such as reasoning and deep research when entitled
Manage subscription access through voucher redemption
Update profile details such as display name and avatar URL
Review wallet balance, active tier, and billing history

features.name: User Login & Register
features.description: Allows users to authenticate with email/password or Google OAuth before accessing protected areas of the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter an email address -> Enter a password -> Submit the form -> See the authenticated experience
Navigate to /login -> Choose Google sign-in -> Complete the authentication flow -> See the authenticated experience
Navigate to /login -> Enter an email address -> Submit the sign-in form with missing or invalid credentials -> See validation feedback

features.name: Chat Interface
features.description: Provides the main AI chat experience with model selection and optional thinking or deep research modes based on access level.
user_flows: Navigate to /chat -> Select an AI model -> Enable reasoning mode if desired -> Enter a message -> Send the message -> View the streamed reply
Navigate to /chat -> Select an available AI model -> Enable deep research mode if available -> Enter a research question -> Send the message -> View the detailed reply
Navigate to /chat -> Select a locked AI model -> Observe that the model requires a higher subscription tier -> Return to model selection

features.name: Subscription Pricing
features.description: Lets users review available subscription tiers and redeem a voucher to unlock or upgrade access.
user_flows: Navigate to /pricing -> View the available subscription tiers -> Enter a valid voucher code -> Redeem the voucher -> See the updated subscription access
Navigate to /pricing -> View the available subscription tiers -> Enter an invalid voucher code -> Redeem the voucher -> See validation feedback

features.name: Profile Settings
features.description: Lets users update their profile display name and avatar URL.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Edit the display name -> Edit the avatar URL -> Save the changes -> See the updated profile details
Navigate to /settings -> Clear or enter an invalid profile value -> Save the changes -> See validation feedback

features.name: Billing Dashboard
features.description: Shows wallet details, current subscription information, and transaction history.
user_flows: Navigate to /billing -> View the wallet balance and active subscription tier -> Review the transaction history log
Navigate to /billing -> View previously redeemed vouchers in the billing history -> Review the credited amounts and tier changes

routes.description: User login page with Google OAuth or Email/Password credentials.
AI chat page with model selection, reasoning toggle, and specific chat modes.
Settings page to manage profile details (Avatar, Display name).
Subscription pricing options tier-based pricing (Starter, Pro, Apex Elite) with voucher inputs.
Billing history page displaying transaction details, vouchers used, and subscription level.

features.name: User Login & Register
features.description: Authenticate user with Email and Password or via Google OAuth.

features.name: Chat Interface
features.description: Fast inference chat, custom models selection, Deep Research and God Mode toggles.
user_interactions: Select AI Model from selector dropdown

features.name: Subscription Pricing
features.description: Choose premium subscription tiers (Starter, Pro, Apex Elite) and redeem vouchers.

features.name: Profile Settings
features.description: Manage user profile information such as Display Name and Avatar URL.

features.name: Billing Dashboard
features.description: View current balance, active subscription tier and billing history.
